title: Hiring Medical Officer at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital!
